description: Material Passport for Calibration —度量校准. Tracks calibration metrics, cross-validation results, model performance evaluations, and style calibration outputs used across the pipeline.

required_artifacts.name: 校准配置
required_artifacts.description: Configuration parameters for the calibration run: metrics selected, datasets used, evaluation criteria.

required_artifacts.name: 度量结果
required_artifacts.description: Quantitative results of all calibrated metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC, Brier score, etc.).

required_artifacts.name: 校准报告
required_artifacts.description: Summary report of calibration findings, deviations, and recommendations.

required_artifacts.name: 参考标准
required_artifacts.description: Reference standards or benchmarks used for calibration (e.g., expected score ranges, threshold values).

optional_artifacts.name: 交叉验证结果
optional_artifacts.description: K-fold or leave-one-out cross-validation results for predictive models.

optional_artifacts.name: 写作风格校准
optional_artifacts.description: Writing style calibration against target journal or regulatory template.

optional_artifacts.name: 漂移分析
optional_artifacts.description: Analysis of metric drift over time or across data snapshots.

quality_gates.name: 指标阈值达标
quality_gates.description: All required metrics meet or exceed the predefined thresholds.

quality_gates.name: 校准可复现性
quality_gates.description: Calibration results are reproducible across repeated runs with the same data.

quality_gates.name: 参考标准一致性
quality_gates.description: Results are consistent with established reference standards or benchmarks.

handoff_to_next_stage.description: Calibration results are consumed by other stages on demand; no fixed downstream stage.
